channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Social Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Editor Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Data Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.description: Dinson Iron and Steel is rapidly becoming one of Zimbabwe’s largest industrial operations as the country intensifies efforts toward industrialisation and value addition under the National Development... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Harare’s 20 AI Robocop Traffic Cameras Will Start Fining Drivers In June 2026
item.description: Harare Motorists To Receive Digital Traffic Fines Under New AI System Harare motorists will begin facing fines from 20 artificial intelligence-powered “Robocop” traffic cameras starting in June 2026 after the Government confirmed that testing of the new smart enforcement system i via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe Central Bank releases ZiG669 million in new banknotes @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe has released new local currency banknotes worth ZiG669 million into circulation as part of efforts to improve cash availability and encourage wider use of the ZiG currency. According to RBZ Governor John Mushayavanhu, the amount released represents ab via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Paul Tungwarara and daughter: a lesson in elite detachment
item.description: ‘Nurses, among the most overworked and underpaid professionals in the country, transformed into props in a performance of wealth’ The post Paul Tungwarara and daughter: a lesson in elite detachment appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Gas Prices Go Up Again
item.description: By Business Reporter — Zimbabweans are facing yet another increase in energy costs after the government, through the Zimbabwe Energy... Continue reading \"Gas Prices Go Up Again\" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: AfDB mission raises stakes for Bulawayo’s US$100 million Glassblock Dam project @AfDB_Group
item.description: A HIGH-level delegation from the African Development Bank Group arrives in Zimbabwe tomorrow for a series of strategic meetings on the proposed US$100 million Glassblock Bopoma Dam and Pipeline Project, as the government intensifies efforts to unlock large-scale financing for cri via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Climate #Environment #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Iran Sends Official Response to US Peace Proposal as Fragile Gulf Ceasefire Faces Fresh Drone Tensions
item.description: IRAN has formally submitted its response to the latest United States proposal aimed at ending the ongoing regional conflict, with Pakistani mediators playing a central diplomatic role as efforts intensify to preserve a fragile ceasefire that continues to face mounting security th via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Man fatally stabs wife during family mediation meeting @bulawayo24
item.description: Efforts to resolve a longstanding domestic dispute ended in tragedy after a 56-year-old man allegedly fatally stabbed his wife during a family mediation meeting in Matshiloni village.Police said Mukho... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Kwekwe serial paedophile gets 75 years @3menonaboat
item.description:
The paedophile abused multiple chidlren aged between 9 and 11.

The post Kwekwe serial paedophile gets 75 years first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: European Union condemns escalation of global conflicts harming ordinary folks
item.description: THE European Union (EU) has defended the rules-based international order and condemned Russia’s invasion of Ukraine while warning that rising global conflicts were worsening economic hardships across the world, including in Zimbabwe. Speaking during Europe Day celebrations in Har via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe, Equatorial Guinea push for stronger cooperation at joint commission talks
item.description: By Xinhua ZIMBABWE and Equatorial Guinea have called for deeper economic and diplomatic cooperation through expanded trade and stronger collaboration on African-led solutions to development challenges, senior government officials said on Saturday. The commitments were made during via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mine shaft collapse leaves three gold diggers dead @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: THREE artisanal miners were buried alive after a 100-metre deep shaft in which they were prospecting for gold collapsed due to a rockfall. Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) national spokesperson, Commissioner Paul Nyathi confirmed the tragedy. “The ZRP reports a tragic incident whic via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bar brawl ends in fatal stabbing
item.description: A FIGHT at a local bar in Silobela, Midlands province, ended in tragedy after a patron was stabbed while trying to stop the fracas. The now deceased Hillary Manyevera (21) was stabbed in the back and sustained a wound which he later succumbed to while admitted in hospital. As a r via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwean TikToker faces backlash over Top Billing presenter audition
item.description: By The South African A ZIMBABWEAN TikToker, Ndoyisile Sibindi, has courted controversy over his official audition tape for the Top Billing presenter search. The content creator – who moved to South Africa to escape homophobia – has previously come under fire over his views about via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Umguza pushes for city status @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Umguza pushes for city status – herald Vusumuzi Dube, Deputy Radar Editor UMGUZA Rural District Council has set its sights on becoming a fully-fledged urban centre after formally applying to be upgraded to Umgungundlovu Western City, in a move expected to unlock massive d via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: BCC tightens burial rules as pressure mounts on cemetery space @zimsituation
item.description: Source: BCC tightens burial rules as pressure mounts on cemetery space – herald Vusumuzi Dube, Deputy Radar Editor THE Bulawayo City Council (BCC) has introduced sweeping new cemetery regulations that tighten burial procedures, formalise cremation and exhumation processes. The po via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Cooking Gas Price Hiked For Second Month Running @thezimbabwean
item.description: The Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) has raised the price of Liquid Petroleum Gas (LPG) for the second time in as many months. via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean
